mapper.sql: select id, bill_no, status, product_id, product_code, product_name, product_spec, draw_no, customer_product_no, abroad_product_no, unit_id, quantity_planned, quantity_assigned, need_day, promise_day, order_day, priority, line_id, wo_type, mps_id, project_id, so_id, so_item_id, quantity_scrap, quantity_redisp, quantity_rework, quantity_pending, quantity_aod, quantity_output, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from pln_wo
mapper.insert:
insert into pln_wo
bill_no, status, product_id, product_code, product_name, product_spec, draw_no, customer_product_no, abroad_product_no, unit_id, quantity_planned, quantity_assigned, need_day, promise_day, order_day, priority, line_id, wo_type, mps_id, project_id, so_id, so_item_id, quantity_scrap, quantity_redisp, quantity_rework, quantity_pending, quantity_aod, quantity_output, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
#{billNo}, #{status}, #{productId}, #{productCode}, #{productName}, #{productSpec}, #{drawNo}, #{customerProductNo}, #{abroadProductNo}, #{unitId}, #{quantityPlanned}, #{quantityAssigned}, #{needDay}, #{promiseDay}, #{orderDay}, #{priority}, #{lineId}, #{woType}, #{mpsId}, #{projectId}, #{soId}, #{soItemId}, #{quantityScrap}, #{quantityRedisp}, #{quantityRework}, #{quantityPending}, #{quantityAod}, #{quantityOutput}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from pln_wo where id in
#{id}
